title: Mystery binder
wikitext:
[]: Mystery binder.             Quote Post by Corb » Fri Jul 09, 2010 4:49 am http://img535.imageshack.us/i/p7090487.jpg/ It's a plain, black binder. This is the first page. Can anyone tell me what this might be? I made a small album on ImageShack, so feel free to get a good look at this thing. It's hundreds of apparent photocopies of rough sketches, neatly and meticulously arranged. They remind me a lot of the Groundwork books. I've been wondering if this is some kind of actual production material (there's no licensing markings anywhere), or if some fan has way too much free time. Anyone? I'm stumped.

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Fri Jul 09, 2010 5:42 am What's the provenance of the binder? It looks like some of the production materials that I've bought in Mandarake's Nakano Broadway superstore for other shows: pre-sketches for cels, or guides for the animators.

[]: It is a mystery. vOv             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Fri Jul 09, 2010 9:22 am Hm... that's interesting. Those are definately sketches related to 1.0, so it can't be too old, but I haven't seen this anywhere. I don't think it's something that was actually commercially available, at least.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 09, 2010 11:13 am It says "Evangelion Hyoujoushuu", with the latter bit meaning "Facial Expression Collection". All of the images shown are either production illustrations (Shinji and Rei faces) or key frame animation from the opening set of episodes. Reference material for animators, probably, like drinian suggested. Killer Bee wrote: Those are definately sketches related to 1.0

[]:             Quote Post by Dark doom » Fri Jul 09, 2010 2:19 pm That Gendo look's kinda sctratchy, and he has NO GLASSES ON. And I dont seem to remember Misato holding a phone like that.............

[]:             Quote Post by Corb » Fri Jul 09, 2010 2:45 pm As for where it came from, I got it along with a shitload of other goods from a guy who was parting with his Eva collection. I'm pretty sure that he himself didn't really know what it was, because I didn't get clear answer when I asked. That was also another huge source of confusion here for me. I highly, highly doubt that it's related to 1.0 because, for starters, this guy didn't even know about the rebuilds when I brought them up to him. Apparently he went mad with Eva collecting years ago then just dropped it about 5 years ago. Also the shot of Misato on the phone is from the scene where she suggests to Ritsuko over the phone that Shinji lives with her, and Ritsuko of course screams in protest because, obviously, Misato is a huge shotacon. I took a bunch more pictures, so have at it: http://img80.imageshack.us/g/p7090512.jpg/

[]: Nobody loves me... /angst             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Fri Jul 09, 2010 5:46 pm Reichu wrote:
